_description: Registry of HiveRunner → .openclaw/workspace/projects/<name>/ couplings. Every entry is a silent cross-workspace dependency that a future session must either MIGRATE (move the referenced project/secret out of OpenClaw) or KEEP (with a clear rationale below). New entries require an explicit add to this file — the check-openclaw-project-deps.mjs script fails CI otherwise. Rule of thumb: the list should shrink over time, never grow.
